Video.summary: Kadeĺs turning 21 in Vegas today, and he's teaming up with Nayeli to take on Jazzy and Shae in a wild challenge.

Video.title: Strongest Siblling

Video.title: Sneaking Into All Boys School

Video.title: Surviving High School

Video.title: Gymnastics Under Water

Video.title: Trying New Jobs

Video.title: Last To Leave Mall

Video.title: Payton's Surgery

Video.title: 1000 Packages For My Crush

Video.title: My Dad Is Missing

Video.title: Home Alone With Security Cameras

Video.title: Win, Cheerleader Ages
